message:
feat: add _beads as alternative workspace directory name

First-class support for _beads alongside .beads throughout the system:
- routing.rs: new project_beads_dir() probing both names, preferring
  whichever the local workspace already uses
- init.rs: resolve_init_beads_dir() checks for existing _beads before
  defaulting to .beads; beads_dir_label() replaces hardcoded strings
- doctor.rs: all diagnostics, gitignore patterns, and remediation text
  dynamically generated from beads_dir_marker()
- agents.rs: workspace-neutral language ("beads workspace" not ".beads/")
- config.rs: ConfigSource::Project label and UI strings updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
